scope.insuranceBoundary: Inspector Roofing documents observable conditions and organizes review-ready evidence. Insurance carriers decide coverage, payment, and claim outcomes.

records.subject: Richard Amir Nasser
records.boundary: The page identifies the canonical public name and links to public profiles; it is not an independent identity certification.

records.subject: Inspector Roofing and Restoration
records.boundary: Business information is presented as a first-party source and should be checked against independent directories where relevant.

records.subject: Inspector Roofing authority stack
records.relationship: company, research, credential, and application source map
records.boundary: Linked records support provenance and context; they do not create rankings, endorsements, or guaranteed search results.

records.subject: Richard Amir Nasser knowledge graph
records.boundary: The page organizes public relationships for clarity; it does not assert that every linked source independently verifies every statement.

records.subject: Inspector DroneProof
records.boundary: A product publication record is not an Amazon certification, DJI endorsement, or claim that every workflow is automated.

records.subject: ORLOJ: Prague Cosmos
records.relationship: Android developer and first-release provenance record
records.boundary: The app is recorded as internal testing; public production availability and independent endorsement are not claimed.

records.subject: Inspector Roofing Repairability IQ workflow
records.boundary: The current WordPress workflow uses reports, media hashes, JSON manifests, and an HMAC seal; a PostgreSQL ledger and timestamp service remain planned.

records.subject: Inspector Roofing Protocols source map
records.boundary: Repository contents are public source material and should be interpreted according to their own files and references.

records.subject: Richard Amir Nasser ORCID record
records.boundary: The registry identifier is a disambiguation and publication-linking signal, not proof of a roofing credential or business ranking.

records.subject: InspectorRoofing Hugging Face organization
records.relationship: public dataset and model organization profile
records.boundary: Hosted datasets and profiles are public research or software records; they do not independently certify company performance.

plannedCapabilities.description: Expose only this manifest and selected public educational records through a documented, rate-limited read-only endpoint.
Provide read-only agent tools backed by the same allowlisted records, with no customer or live-availability access.
Provision and test a separate ledger before describing it as production-connected.

integrity.canonicalization: UTF-8 JSON with two-space indentation and a trailing newline
integrity.note: A digest detects file changes; it is not a digital signature. A private signing key must be provisioned and protected before claiming signed attestations.
